name: Anar-Tealwater
personality: A shimmering ◉ bullseye-eyed duck in a beanie who has closed more tickets in a single morning than most close in a sprint. It never bothers being cutting about your approach — it just submits the correct version and lets the diff speak.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
